basic_details.job_title: Rajasthan RSSB CET Graduation Level 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for Patwari, Supervisor and More posts
basic_details.short_information: Before diving into details, candidates can use this quick overview to understand the key facts of the RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 Bharti at a glance. This summary table covers the organization, exam name, application window, and mode of examination.

important_dates.correction_date: During application period + 3 days after closing (with fee)
important_dates.admit_card_date: Available on SSO Login / Recruitment Portal before exam
important_dates.score validity: 3 years from the date of result

application_fee.details: The application fee for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 depends on the candidate's category, and payment must be made online through e-Mitra kiosks, CSC centers, net banking, debit card, or credit card. Candidates who have already deposited the One Time Registration (OTR) fee earlier are not required to pay it again.

age_limit.details: The minimum age required is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 40 years , calculated as on 01 January 2027 . Age relaxation is available for reserved categories as detailed below. | Category Age Relaxation General Category Women 5 years SC/ST/OBC/MBC/EWS Male (Rajasthan Domicile) 5 years SC/ST/OBC/MBC/EWS Women (Rajasthan Domicile) 10 years Persons with Disabilities 5 years (additional to service rule relaxation) Ex-Servicemen 15 years (up to 50 years, or 55 years where lower post experience is mandatory) Widows / Divorced Women No upper age limit (subject to retirement age) | Note: These relaxations are non-cumulative - a candidate can avail benefit of only one relaxation provision, not multiple provisions combined.

qualification.details: Candidates often ask what qualification is needed for RSSB CET Graduate Level Recruitment 2026 - the answer is a graduation degree or its equivalent, as per the Personnel Department notification dated 23.05.2022 and 13.10.2022. Applicants who are appearing in the final year of their graduation can also apply, but they must acquire the qualification as required by the respective service rules before final selection. Specific educational qualification, age, and experience requirements for each post will apply as per the service rules governing recruitment to that particular post. | The minimum age required is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 40 years, calculated as on 01 January 2027. Age relaxation is available for reserved categories as detailed below. | Note: These relaxations are non-cumulative - a candidate can avail benefit of only one relaxation provision, not multiple provisions combined.

selection_process: the RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 works as a single qualifying eligibility test valid for multiple posts. Simply appearing in and scoring in the CET does not guarantee a job - candidates must separately qualify in the main recruitment exam conducted by the respective recruiting agency for the specific post they wish to join.

Step 1: Online application submission (04 July 2026 – 02 August 2026) Step 2: Admit card release via SSO Portal / Recruitment Portal Step 3: CET Graduate Level exam (01–03 December 2026) Step 4: Answer key publication and objection window (fee ₹100 per objection) Step 5: Result and score declaration on SSO ID and official website Step 6: Score valid for 3 years; candidates apply for main exams of desired services separately Step 7: Main recruitment exam
and final selection as per respective service rules

Candidates must score a minimum of 40% marks in the CET to be eligible for the main written exam/interview of the subordinate and ministerial posts listed in this notification. SC/ST candidates get up to 5% relaxation in this minimum qualifying mark.

pattern_table.Information: 1/3 mark deducted for each wrong answer
5 options (A-E); Option E must be marked for unattempted questions

exam_pattern.details: The RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 exam consists of objective-type multiple-choice questions covering History, Geography, Polity, Economy, Science and Technology, Reasoning, Mathematics, Current Affairs, Computer Knowledge, and General Hindi and English. All questions carry equal marks, and there is negative marking for wrong answers. | Note: If a candidate does not darken any of the five circles for more than 10% of the questions, they will be declared disqualified. For unmarked questions within the 10% limit, 1/3 mark is deducted as if the answer were wrong.

syllabus.details: The RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 exam consists of objective-type multiple-choice questions covering History, Geography, Polity, Economy, Science and Technology, Reasoning, Mathematics, Current Affairs, Computer Knowledge, and General Hindi and English. All questions carry equal marks, and there is negative marking for wrong answers. | Detail Information Total Questions 150 Total Marks 300 Exam Duration 3 Hours Negative Marking 1/3 mark deducted for each wrong answer Answer Sheet Options 5 options (A-E); Option E must be marked for unattempted questions | Note: If a candidate does not darken any of the five circles for more than 10% of the questions, they will be declared disqualified. For unmarked questions within the 10% limit, 1/3 mark is deducted as if the answer were wrong.

important_instructions: The RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 application requires candidates to upload a live photograph, signature, and thumb impression as per strict formatting rules. The photo must have a white or light-colored background, cover at least 50% of the frame, and must not include spectacles with glare, caps, or dark glasses.

Signature and thumb impression must be scanned in JPEG format only. Signature file size should be between 20 KB and 50 KB. Photos or signatures captured via mobile phone camera are not accepted. Left thumb impression is mandatory (right thumb if left is unavailable).

content_sections.text: Candidates looking for the RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 PDF Download link can access the complete official notification directly from the RSSB website to check full eligibility conditions, reservation rules, and the detailed syllabus. Downloading and reading the original PDF before applying is strongly recommended, since the board holds the applicant fully responsible for any incorrect information submitted online. content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 Recruitment: Quick Overview
content_sections.text: Before diving into details, candidates can use this quick overview to understand the key facts of the RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 Bharti at a glance. This summary table covers the organization, exam name, application window, and mode of examination.

content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level Important Dates 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates preparing for the RSSB CET Graduate Level Apply Online 2026 process should note every deadline carefully, as the board does not accept offline applications under any circumstances. The registration window opens on 04 July 2026 and closes on 02 August 2026 at 23:59 hrs. The exam itself is scheduled across three days in December 2026.

rows.date: During application period + 3 days after closing (with fee)
Available on SSO Login / Recruitment Portal before exam
3 years from the date of result

content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level Vacancy 2026: Services and Posts Covered
content_sections.text: The RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 is only a qualifying eligibility test and does not carry a fixed vacancy count of its own. Instead, the board will announce department-wise and service-wise vacancy numbers separately when it issues the main recruitment notification for each post. Candidates who qualify the CET with the required minimum marks become eligible to apply for the main exam of any of these 12 services.

rows.service_name: Rajasthan Integrated Child Development Subordinate Service
Rajasthan Revenue (Land Records, Land Management & Colonization) Subordinate Service
Rajasthan Tribal Area Development State and Subordinate Service

content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates often ask what qualification is needed for RSSB CET Graduate Level Recruitment 2026 - the answer is a graduation degree or its equivalent, as per the Personnel Department notification dated 23.05.2022 and 13.10.2022. Applicants who are appearing in the final year of their graduation can also apply, but they must acquire the qualification as required by the respective service rules before final selection. Specific educational qualification, age, and experience requirements for each post will apply as per the service rules governing recruitment to that particular post. The minimum age required is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 40 years , calculated as on 01 January 2027 . Age relaxation is available for reserved categories as detailed below. Note: These relaxations are non-cumulative - a candidate can avail benefit of only one relaxation provision, not multiple provisions combined.

rows.age_relaxation: 15 years (up to 50 years, or 55 years where lower post experience is mandatory)
No upper age limit (subject to retirement age)

content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: The application fee for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 depends on the candidate's category, and payment must be made online through e-Mitra kiosks, CSC centers, net banking, debit card, or credit card. Candidates who have already deposited the One Time Registration (OTR) fee earlier are not required to pay it again.

rows.category: Non-Creamy Layer OBC/MBC, EWS, SC, ST (Rajasthan)

content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Unlike a direct recruitment exam, the RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 works as a single qualifying eligibility test valid for multiple posts. Simply appearing in and scoring in the CET does not guarantee a job - candidates must separately qualify in the main recruitment exam conducted by the respective recruiting agency for the specific post they wish to join. Step 1: Online application submission (04 July 2026 – 02 August 2026) Step 2: Admit card release via SSO Portal / Recruitment Portal Step 3: CET Graduate Level exam (01–03 December 2026) Step 4: Answer key publication and objection window (fee ₹100 per objection) Step 5: Result and score declaration on SSO ID and official website Step 6: Score valid for 3 years; candidates apply for main exams of desired services separately Step 7: Main recruitment exam, document verification, and final selection as per respective service rules Candidates must score a minimum of 40% marks in the CET to be eligible for the main written exam/interview of the subordinate and ministerial posts listed in this notification. SC/ST candidates get up to 5% relaxation in this minimum qualifying mark.

content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level Apply Online 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates who want to complete the RSSB CET Graduate Level Apply Online 2026 process must first log in through the SSO Rajasthan portal. Below is the step-by-step process for submitting the online application form correctly. Visit the SSO Portal at sso.rajasthan.gov.in and log in using your SSO ID. Select "Recruitment Portal" under Citizen Apps (G2C). Click on "Apply Now" against RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026. If not already done, complete One Time Registration (OTR) by entering category, disability status, and home state details, then pay the OTR fee. Fill in the online application form carefully; educational and other details must be uploaded in the Document Details section. Upload live photo, signature, and thumb impression as captured through OTR. Verify all entries and click Final Submit. Note down the Application ID and print the confirmation for future reference. Important: Once the application is finally submitted, candidates cannot change their name, father's name, date of birth, photograph, or signature except during the limited correction window provided by the board.

content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level Exam Pattern and Syllabus 2026
content_sections.text: The RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 exam consists of objective-type multiple-choice questions covering History, Geography, Polity, Economy, Science and Technology, Reasoning, Mathematics, Current Affairs, Computer Knowledge, and General Hindi and English. All questions carry equal marks, and there is negative marking for wrong answers. Note: If a candidate does not darken any of the five circles for more than 10% of the questions, they will be declared disqualified. For unmarked questions within the 10% limit, 1/3 mark is deducted as if the answer were wrong.

rows.information: 1/3 mark deducted for each wrong answer
5 options (A-E); Option E must be marked for unattempted questions

content_sections.heading: RSSB CET Graduate Level Document and Photo Upload Guidelines
content_sections.text: The RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 application requires candidates to upload a live photograph, signature, and thumb impression as per strict formatting rules. The photo must have a white or light-colored background, cover at least 50% of the frame, and must not include spectacles with glare, caps, or dark glasses. Signature and thumb impression must be scanned in JPEG format only. Signature file size should be between 20 KB and 50 KB. Photos or signatures captured via mobile phone camera are not accepted. Left thumb impression is mandatory (right thumb if left is unavailable).

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid While Applying for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates lose their chance of correction or face rejection due to avoidable errors during the RSSB CET Graduate Level Bharti 2026 application process. Being aware of these common mistakes in advance can save time and prevent disqualification. Selecting the wrong category column - category cannot be changed after the correction window closes. Uploading a blurry photo or signature that does not match the admit card image, leading to rejection at the exam center. Missing the OTR One Time Registration step before starting the main application. Using someone else's SSO ID to submit the form - such applications are treated as invalid. Waiting until the last date to apply, risking payment or portal errors during high traffic. Forgetting to fill the mandatory "visible body mark" field in the application. Ignoring the Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe area declaration column where applicable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window is open from 04 July 2026 to 02 August 2026 (up to 11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility qualification for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a graduation degree or its equivalent qualification to appear in this Common Eligibility Test.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at least 18 years old and not more than 40 years old as on 01 January 2027, with category-wise relaxation available.

faq.question: Q4. When will the RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026 exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The exam will be held from 01 December 2026 to 03 December 2026 in offline OMR-based mode.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are there in RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026?
faq.answer: No fixed vacancy number is announced with this notification since it is only a qualifying eligibility test; vacancies will be announced separately for each of the 12 services during their main recruitment exams.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹600 for general and creamy layer OBC/MBC candidates, and ₹400 for non-creamy layer OBC/MBC, EWS, SC, ST, and PwD candidates.

faq.question: Q7. How long is the RSSB CET Graduate Level score valid?
faq.answer: The score obtained in this Common Eligibility Test remains valid for 3 years from the date of result declaration.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualifying mark in RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must score at least 40% marks to be eligible for the main exam or interview, with a 5% relaxation available for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Can final-year graduation students apply for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates in their final year of graduation can apply, but they must complete their qualification as required by the relevant service rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I apply online for RSSB CET Graduate Level 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the Recruitment Portal accessible via SSO Login at sso.rajasthan.gov.in.
